name: Backrooms: Skibidi Shooter
description: Backrooms: Skibidi Shooter features endless backrooms crowded with skibidi toilets and your mission is to shoot your way through each level and try to find the exit to successfully complete each level and unlock new weapons.
instructions: WASD - Move LMB - Shoot RMB - Aim R - Reload G - Grenade Space - Jump
tags: 1 Player, 3D, 3D Games, Action, Adventure, Gun, Shoot, Shoot 'Em Up, Shooter, Shooting, Skibidi, Skibidi Toilet, Unity3D
